description: Comprehensive errno operations conformance: __errno_location, strerror, strerror_r, perror. POSIX.1-2017 + glibc extensions.

cases.name: errno_location_nonnull_strict
cases.notes: Must return non-null pointer to thread-local errno

cases.name: errno_initially_zero_strict
cases.notes: errno should be 0 at start of well-formed program

cases.name: errno_location_nonnull_hardened
cases.notes: Hardened mode must also return valid errno pointer

cases.name: errno_set_read_roundtrip
cases.notes: Setting errno via *__errno_location() = EINVAL must be readable back

cases.name: errno_thread_local_isolation
cases.notes: Each thread has its own errno - setting in one thread doesn't affect another

cases.name: strerror_einval
cases.notes: EINVAL (22) must return 'Invalid argument' message

cases.name: strerror_enoent
cases.notes: ENOENT (2) must return standard message

cases.name: strerror_eacces
cases.notes: EACCES (13) must return standard message

cases.name: strerror_eexist
cases.notes: EEXIST (17) must return standard message

cases.name: strerror_enosys
cases.notes: ENOSYS (38) must return standard message

cases.name: strerror_etimedout
cases.notes: ETIMEDOUT (110) must return standard message

cases.name: strerror_zero
cases.notes: Error 0 should return 'Success'

cases.name: strerror_unknown_positive
cases.notes: Unknown positive error returns formatted message, may set errno to EINVAL

cases.name: strerror_negative
cases.notes: Negative error number returns formatted message, may set errno to EINVAL

cases.name: strerror_r_success
cases.notes: XSI strerror_r: returns 0 on success, fills buffer with message

cases.name: strerror_r_buffer_too_small
cases.notes: Buffer too small: returns ERANGE (34)

cases.name: strerror_r_null_buffer
cases.notes: NULL buffer: returns EINVAL (22)

cases.name: strerror_l_einval
cases.notes: Locale-specific strerror with C locale returns standard message

cases.name: perror_prefix
cases.expected_output: test_op: No such file or directory
cases.notes: perror outputs 's: <error message>' to stderr

cases.name: perror_null_prefix
cases.notes: perror with NULL prefix outputs just the error message

cases.name: perror_empty_prefix
cases.notes: perror with empty string prefix outputs just the error message

cases.name: errno_macro_all_standard_values
cases.notes: All standard POSIX errno constants must be defined: EPERM(1), ENOENT(2), ESRCH(3), EINTR(4), EIO(5), ENXIO(6), E2BIG(7), ENOEXEC(8), EBADF(9), ECHILD(10), EAGAIN(11), ENOMEM(12), EACCES(13), EFAULT(14), ENOTBLK(15), EBUSY(16), EEXIST(17), EXDEV(18), ENODEV(19), ENOTDIR(20), EISDIR(21), EINVAL(22)

cases.name: errno_preserved_across_successful_call
cases.notes: Successful library calls must not modify errno. Pre-set errno=42, call strlen(), errno must still be 42.
